  "rationale": "The presence of honeycomb in an in-service industrial concrete structure indicates a failure to comply with consolidation requirements. This defect reduces structural integrity, permits water/chemical ingress, accelerates rebar corrosion, and violates ACI 301 and 304 standards for proper consolidation and placement.",
